steps.title: Use the outlier signal
steps.content: Jets reaching the ionosphere are called outliers because the ionosphere begins about 80 km above Earth. The next clause says most jets reach only 20 to 50 km, which confirms that the ionosphere-reaching jets are unusual.

steps.title: Reject wrong relations
steps.content: A signals contrast, B signals cause and effect, and D simply adds another point. The blank needs a transition that reinforces the previous claim by introducing confirming evidence about the majority of jets. The answer is C.
